endpoints.description: Look up any Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) for company information lookup and counterparty / know-your-business (KYB) identity against the official GLEIF global registry — returns legal name, status, jurisdiction, legal form and registered address, real-time, worldwide coverage.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: GLEIF LEI Lookup: Look up any Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) for company information lookup and counterparty / know-your-business (KYB) identity against the official GLEIF global registry — returns legal name, status, jurisdiction, legal form and registered address, real-time, worldwide coverage. Input: lei.

outputExample.disclaimer: Indicative data from the GLEIF register, not a compliance opinion.

endpoints.description: Screen a name against the official EU consolidated sanctions list (FISMA) for anti-money-laundering (AML) and watchlist checks — returns matches with a similarity score and context (EU reference, type, programme), not a binary yes/no.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: EU Sanctions Screening: Screen a name against the official EU consolidated sanctions list (FISMA) for anti-money-laundering (AML) and watchlist checks — returns matches with a similarity score and context (EU reference, type, programme), not a binary yes/no. Input: name, type, threshold, limit.

name.description: Name to screen (person or entity), e.g. 'Saddam Hussein'

threshold.description: Min similarity 0-1 to report a match (default 0.7)

outputExample.source: EU Consolidated Financial Sanctions List — FISMA (webgate.ec.europa.eu)
outputExample.disclaimer: Indicative screening against the EU consolidated list; a match is not a legal confirmation and requires human review. Not a compliance opinion.

endpoints.description: Live prediction market odds, implied probabilities and betting-market data from Polymarket — give a market id or slug, get each outcome with its probability (0-1), volume, liquidity and resolution status.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Polymarket Odds: Live prediction market odds, implied probabilities and betting-market data from Polymarket — give a market id or slug, get each outcome with its probability (0-1), volume, liquidity and resolution status. Input: market.

market.description: Polymarket market id or slug, e.g. '2654605' or 'will-it-rain-tomorrow'

outputExample.question: Set 2 Winner: Andreeva vs Day
outputExample.disclaimer: Indicative market odds, not investment advice.

endpoints.description: Token safety check before buying — is this token a honeypot or a rug pull? Bundles honeypot detection, buy/sell tax, holder concentration, LP lock and liquidity (GoPlus, Honeypot.is, DexScreener) into a single 0-100 token security risk score with a clear buy/avoid verdict. One call replaces three lookups. EVM chains.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Token Safety Check: Token safety check before buying — is this token a honeypot or a rug pull? Bundles honeypot detection, buy/sell tax, holder concentration, LP lock and liquidity (GoPlus, Honeypot.is, DexScreener) into a single 0-100 token security risk score with a clear buy/avoid verdict. One call replaces three lookups. EVM chains. Input: token, chain.

chain.description: base | ethereum | bsc | polygon | arbitrum | optimism | avalanche (default base)

outputExample.verdict: Low risk on automated checks. Always DYOR.
outputExample.disclaimer: Automated heuristic safety check, not financial advice. Always do your own research.

endpoints.description: One-call GO/CAUTION/NO-GO pre-trade verdict for AI trading agents: fuses token safety (honeypot, rug, tax, holders), counterparty wallet sanctions screening (OFAC/mixer) and cross-exchange market signal into a single decision with a signed, offline-verifiable receipt. Should I buy this token now? Replaces three separate calls (token-safety + wallet-screen + signal) with one fused GO/NO-GO verdict. EVM chains and Solana.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Pre-Trade Verdict: One-call GO/CAUTION/NO-GO pre-trade verdict for AI trading agents: fuses token safety (honeypot, rug, tax, holders), counterparty wallet sanctions screening (OFAC/mixer) and cross-exchange market signal into a single decision with a signed, offline-verifiable receipt. Should I buy this token now? Replaces three separate calls (token-safety + wallet-screen + signal) with one fused GO/NO-GO verdict. EVM chains and Solana. Input: token, chain, wallet.

token.description: Token contract (EVM 0x+40hex) or SPL mint (base58) to evaluate

chain.description: base | ethereum | bsc | polygon | arbitrum | optimism | avalanche | solana (default base)

reasons.label: Token safety score 95/100 (low risk on automated checks).

outputExample.disclaimer: Fused pre-trade verdict from automated safety/screening/signal checks. Heuristic, not financial advice. Always DYOR.

endpoints.description: Full degen token dossier in one call: safety score + honeypot/tax + detailed TOP HOLDERS and concentration + liquidity/FDV/volume/pool-age + contract control (owner, creator, mintable, open-source) + an AI red-flag narrative. Deep due-diligence report on a token before aping — the premium tier above a plain safety check. EVM chains and Solana.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Token Dossier: Full degen token dossier in one call: safety score + honeypot/tax + detailed TOP HOLDERS and concentration + liquidity/FDV/volume/pool-age + contract control (owner, creator, mintable, open-source) + an AI red-flag narrative. Deep due-diligence report on a token before aping — the premium tier above a plain safety check. EVM chains and Solana. Input: token, chain.

chain.description: base | ethereum | bsc | polygon | arbitrum | optimism | avalanche | solana (default base)

narrative.summary: USDC is a fully-collateralized blue-chip stablecoin with deep liquidity; automated checks show no rug/honeypot signals.

outputExample.source: GoPlus Security + Honeypot.is + DexScreener + Claude Haiku (narrative)
outputExample.disclaimer: Automated token dossier (safety + holders + liquidity + narrative). Heuristic, not financial advice. Always DYOR.

endpoints.description: Solana SPL token safety, rug check and honeypot / scam detection before trading: is this Solana token a rug pull, honeypot or scam? Verdict SAFE/RISKY/CRITICAL + 0-100 score combining STATIC checks (mint/freeze authority, holder concentration) AND BEHAVIORAL analysis (liquidity, churn, recent dump, tx velocity) plus a blue-chip false-positive guard so USDC/USDT/SOL are never flagged. Pre-trade SPL token security / scam-token detection catching behavioral rugs static checkers miss.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Solana Token Safety Pro: Solana SPL token safety, rug check and honeypot / scam detection before trading: is this Solana token a rug pull, honeypot or scam? Verdict SAFE/RISKY/CRITICAL + 0-100 score combining STATIC checks (mint/freeze authority, holder concentration) AND BEHAVIORAL analysis (liquidity, churn, recent dump, tx velocity) plus a blue-chip false-positive guard so USDC/USDT/SOL are never flagged. Pre-trade SPL token security / scam-token detection catching behavioral rugs static checkers miss. Input: mint, deep.

deep.description: Deeper behavioral + holder analysis (more RPC calls)

static_flags.label: Mint authority not renounced — supply can be inflated

behavioral_flags.label: Liquidity is 1.4% of FDV — top-heavy valuation

false_positive_guard.note: Not whitelisted; behavioral context applied to avoid static-only over-flagging.

concentration.note: Largest account may be an AMM/LP pool, not a malicious whale.

outputExample.disclaimer: Automated heuristic safety check (static + behavioral), not financial advice. Always DYOR.

endpoints.description: All-in-one Solana pre-trade decision in ONE call: BUY-SAFE/CAUTION/AVOID fusing four scored modules — token security, EXECUTABLE liquidity depth (estimated slippage at $100/$1k/$10k), deployer history/control and holder concentration. Should I buy or avoid this Solana token? Full token due-diligence in one call — replaces 3-4 lookups; built for a trading / sniping agent's risk-review pipeline. Solana trading safety decision and buy/avoid verdict.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Solana Pre-Trade Bundle: All-in-one Solana pre-trade decision in ONE call: BUY-SAFE/CAUTION/AVOID fusing four scored modules — token security, EXECUTABLE liquidity depth (estimated slippage at $100/$1k/$10k), deployer history/control and holder concentration. Should I buy or avoid this Solana token? Full token due-diligence in one call — replaces 3-4 lookups; built for a trading / sniping agent's risk-review pipeline. Solana trading safety decision and buy/avoid verdict. Input: mint.

mint.description: SPL token mint address (base58) to evaluate before buying

reasons.label: Mint & freeze authority renounced — deployer retains no control

liquidity_depth.note: Estimated from pooled liquidity via a constant-product model; real slippage depends on routing.

deployer_history.note: Deployer no longer controls the mint.

holder_concentration.note: Largest account may be an AMM/LP pool, not a malicious whale.

outputExample.disclaimer: All-in-one pre-trade decision (security + executable depth + deployer + concentration). Heuristic, not advice. Always DYOR.

endpoints.description: Quick check of where an x402 seller ranks RIGHT NOW by keyword-relevance in the CDP Bazaar discovery (not the raw settled-volume rank the free explorers show): best rank + per-category-keyword rank in one cheap call, plus a pointer to the full /agent/visibility-audit when the rank slips. The frequent pulse for monitoring your x402 discoverability. Where do I rank now? Am I being out-ranked on my category keywords?
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Agent Rank Check: Quick check of where an x402 seller ranks RIGHT NOW by keyword-relevance in the CDP Bazaar discovery (not the raw settled-volume rank the free explorers show): best rank + per-category-keyword rank in one cheap call, plus a pointer to the full /agent/visibility-audit when the rank slips. The frequent pulse for monitoring your x402 discoverability. Where do I rank now? Am I being out-ranked on my category keywords? Input: seller.

seller.description: Seller to check: wallet (0x + 40 hex or Solana base58) or origin URL/domain, e.g. 'api.example.com'

outputExample.headline: Best rank #14 (outside the top 10) — you're being out-ranked.
outputExample.recommendation: Rank is slipping on ['compliance'] → run /agent/visibility-audit for the metadata score, prioritized fixes and a signed delta over time.
outputExample.note: Keyword-RELEVANCE rank in CDP Bazaar discovery/search — not the raw settled-volume rank the free explorers show.

endpoints.description: Audit how discoverable an x402 agent/seller is across the agent registries (CDP Bazaar, 402index): keyword-RELEVANCE rank per category (not raw settled-volume rank), a metadata-quality score of your advertised endpoints (schema, output.example, tags, llm_usage_prompt), settle activity, a top-3 benchmark, prioritized fixes, and a DELTA vs a signed snapshot you carry back. Why am I not being found and how do I climb? GEO/AEO discovery audit for x402 sellers, Ed25519-signed.
endpoints.llm_usage_prompt: Agent Visibility Audit: Audit how discoverable an x402 agent/seller is across the agent registries (CDP Bazaar, 402index): keyword-RELEVANCE rank per category (not raw settled-volume rank), a metadata-quality score of your advertised endpoints (schema, output.example, tags, llm_usage_prompt), settle activity, a top-3 benchmark, prioritized fixes, and a DELTA vs a signed snapshot you carry back. Why am I not being found and how do I climb? GEO/AEO discovery audit for x402 sellers, Ed25519-signed. Input: seller, snapshot.

seller.description: Seller to audit: wallet (0x + 40 hex or Solana base58) or origin URL/domain, e.g. 'api.example.com'

snapshot.description: Optional: the signed_snapshot JSON from a previous audit, to compute a dated delta

outputExample.summary: Solid metadata but mid-pack keyword rank (#14 for 'kyb', absent for 'compliance'). Top fix: add a real output.example to endpoints missing one.

keyword_rank.note: Keyword-relevance rank in CDP Bazaar discovery (not settled-volume rank).

prioritized_fixes.fix: Add a real output.example to each endpoint.

outputExample.snapshot_usage: Pass signed_snapshot back as ?snapshot= next time for a dated delta.
outputExample.disclaimer: Discoverability audit; scores/deltas deterministic and signed, summary is explanation only. Not a guarantee of placement.
